title: centella calcaria
intro: Centella calcaria, also known as Marsh Pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Centella calcaria include improved memory and cognitive function, enhanced skin health, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine for treating various ailments. Herbal preparations of Centella calcaria include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions like eczema and acne.
